creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
Created attachment 236261
poudriere log showing build failure

This was running:

FreeBSD freebeast.catwhisker.org 12.3-STABLE FreeBSD 12.3-STABLE #99 stable/12-n235593-3e39cbb10e0: Wed Aug 31 10:33:12 UTC 2022     root@freebeast.catwhisker.org:/common/S1/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64 1203507 1203507

lang/python39 is the version of Python installed.

The ports tree is "head" (main-n593552-f947e6b04e2a).

Both via portmaster and via poudriere.  I have attached the poudriere log.

Please note that in the case of poudriere, this causes a bit of a cascade failure (in my case, 176 packages skipped).
